canonical.title: Obsidian AI plugins for in-vault retrieval & summarization (Apr 2026)

parent.title: Upgrading a personal Obsidian workflow in 2026

siblings.title: Low-friction capture & AI-assisted backfill
siblings.summary: How to lower capture friction across desktop, mobile, web, voice — and how to run AI tag/metadata backfill across an existing vault in 2026.

siblings.title: Frontmatter & tagging schemas for extraction
siblings.summary: How to design Obsidian YAML frontmatter and tag taxonomies in 2026 so external tools can reliably extract, query, and validate the metadata.

siblings.title: Knowledge-base patterns for a technical vault
siblings.summary: What actually works for a technical Obsidian vault in 2026: hybrid PARA+Zettel skeleton, Properties-first metadata, daily-note capture, MOCs over deep folders, and a small high-value plugin set.

siblings.title: Automated media tracking (books / movies / series)
siblings.summary: Pick a tracking hub per medium (Hardcover for books, Simkl for film/TV), automate capture with Readwise + CrossWatch, and pull into Obsidian via Media DB or Book Search plugins.

siblings.title: Selective publishing to GitHub Pages or equivalents
siblings.summary: Pick the opt-in (whitelist) frontmatter pattern over draft-style opt-out; Quartz + ExplicitPublish is the closest free match to Obsidian Publish.

sources.title: brianpetro/obsidian-smart-connections
sources.claim: Smart Connections is a free Obsidian plugin offering AI embeddings to chat with notes and surface related content; supports local models or 100+ via APIs (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, Llama 3).

sources.title: smartconnections.app — Smart Connections
sources.claim: Smart Connections runs indexing and retrieval locally by default with on-device embeddings, no API key needed.

sources.title: smartconnections.app — Pro plugins
sources.claim: Smart Connections core remains free; Pro tier with extras via 14-day free trial yearly or monthly plan.

sources.title: logancyang/obsidian-copilot
sources.claim: Copilot for Obsidian is a vault-aware chat plugin with Vault QA / RAG mode, Ollama support, and Agent mode in the Plus tier.

sources.title: obsidiancopilot.com — Pricing
sources.claim: Plus $14.99/mo or $139.99/yr; Self-Host Supporter $349.99 one-time.

sources.title: obsidian-copilot — local_copilot.md
sources.claim: How to run fully local: install Ollama, pull a model and an embedding model, point at localhost:11434.

sources.title: glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer
sources.claim: Smart Composer is a Cursor-style AI chat with @file/@vault context, Apply-Edit one-click edits, MCP support.

sources.title: Smart Composer wiki — Vault Search (RAG)
sources.claim: Vault Search RAG injects relevant notes via Cmd+Shift+Enter or @Vault.

sources.title: khoj-ai/khoj
sources.claim: Self-hostable AI second brain with semantic search and chat; reachable from Obsidian, Emacs, browser, desktop, phone, WhatsApp.

sources.title: docs.khoj.dev — Obsidian client
sources.claim: Khoj Obsidian plugin: chat, transformer-based incremental search, similar-notes discovery against an automatically synced vault.

sources.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin
sources.claim: Template-driven generation plugin supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, HuggingFace, and local models.

sources.title: SystemSculpt — Best Obsidian AI Plugins 2026
sources.claim: April 2026 review notes the ecosystem now splits into retrieval engines, workflow operators, and agent surfaces.

sources.title: Obsidian forum — Alternatives to Smart Connections
sources.claim: CoPilot's Vault Q&A indexes all notes for semantic search similar to Smart Connections.

sources.title: XDA — Using my local LLM with Obsidian
sources.claim: Copilot is the most polished local-LLM option, native Ollama support, Relevant Notes auto-context.

sources.title: InsiderLLM — Obsidian local LLM guide
sources.claim: First-build embedding indexing on a 5,000-note vault takes 20–30 minutes locally.

sources.title: irbull/obsidian-ai-summary
sources.claim: Walks links from the current note and summarizes each linked note in a dialog — useful for weekly/monthly review summaries.

sources.title: ravenwits/obsidian-ai-summarize
sources.claim: Small dedicated summarization plugin with chunking for large documents and customizable profiles.

sources.title: danielrosehill/awesome-obsidian-ai-tools
sources.claim: Community-maintained list of retrieval, summarization, and agent-style plugins.

sources.title: 3sztof.github.io — Smart Connections + MCP
sources.claim: Wiring Smart Connections retrieval into a full agent loop via Model Context Protocol — the new pattern for advanced users.

sources.title: Obsidian forum — Obsidian Chat agentic plugin
sources.claim: Newer agentic plugins extend beyond Q&A to read notes, make edits, and create files autonomously.
